title: Implement and monitor biosecurity measures in poultry production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement and monitor biosecurity measures in poultry production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply biosecurity procedures for site entry

pcs.text: Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry worksite.

pcs.text: Identify worksite biosecurity procedures and measures developed to comply with relevant legislation, regulations, codes of practice, industry guidelines and enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify worksite biosecurity procedures and measures developed to comply with relevant legislation, regulations, codes of practice, industry guidelines and enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify worksite biosecurity procedures and measures developed to comply with relevant legislation, regulations, codes of practice, industry guidelines and enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to implementation of biosecurity measures on a poultry worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to implementation of biosecurity measures on a poultry worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to implementation of biosecurity measures on a poultry worksite.

pcs.text: Ensure contractors and visitors are signed in, checked for risk profile, instructed in their responsibilities, and follow enterprise biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure contractors and visitors are signed in, checked for risk profile, instructed in their responsibilities, and follow enterprise biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure contractors and visitors are signed in, checked for risk profile, instructed in their responsibilities, and follow enterprise biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure contractors and visitors apply personal hygiene and personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure contractors and visitors apply personal hygiene and personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure contractors and visitors apply personal hygiene and personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure all vehicles, equipment, machinery, tools, clothing, footwear, and PPE are cleaned and disinfected prior to entry onto worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure all vehicles, equipment, machinery, tools, clothing, footwear, and PPE are cleaned and disinfected prior to entry onto worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure all vehicles, equipment, machinery, tools, clothing, footwear, and PPE are cleaned and disinfected prior to entry onto worksite.

pcs.text: Check incoming consignment documentation for poultry, feed and feed ingredients prior to entry to worksite for compliance with biosecurity requirements, and report and/or reject noncompliance according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check incoming consignment documentation for poultry, feed and feed ingredients prior to entry to worksite for compliance with biosecurity requirements, and report and/or reject noncompliance according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check incoming consignment documentation for poultry, feed and feed ingredients prior to entry to worksite for compliance with biosecurity requirements, and report and/or reject noncompliance according to enterprise procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Apply biosecurity procedures for site entry

elements.title: Implement biosecurity procedures to minimise spread of disease and pests

pcs.text: Implement enterprise requirements and prescribed routes for movements of personnel, vehicles, equipment, feedstuffs and poultry on worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement enterprise requirements and prescribed routes for movements of personnel, vehicles, equipment, feedstuffs and poultry on worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement enterprise requirements and prescribed routes for movements of personnel, vehicles, equipment, feedstuffs and poultry on worksite.

pcs.text: Ensure all water used for poultry drinking and poultry contact is treated according to enterprise quality requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure all water used for poultry drinking and poultry contact is treated according to enterprise quality requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure all water used for poultry drinking and poultry contact is treated according to enterprise quality requirements.

pcs.text: Implement personal hygiene and sanitation, and equipment cleaning procedures for people movement between site facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement personal hygiene and sanitation, and equipment cleaning procedures for people movement between site facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement personal hygiene and sanitation, and equipment cleaning procedures for people movement between site facilities.

pcs.text: Implement biosecure procedures for carcass, effluent, organic waste and inorganic waste removal and disposal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement biosecure procedures for carcass, effluent, organic waste and inorganic waste removal and disposal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement biosecure procedures for carcass, effluent, organic waste and inorganic waste removal and disposal.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement biosecurity procedures to minimise spread of disease and pests

elements.title: Implement biosecurity procedures on detection of disease or pest

pcs.text: Identify signs of disease, wild birds and pests that can introduce or spread high risk pathogens in poultry and/or worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of disease, wild birds and pests that can introduce or spread high risk pathogens in poultry and/or worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of disease, wild birds and pests that can introduce or spread high risk pathogens in poultry and/or worksite.

pcs.text: Immediately report signs of unusual disease or pest to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Immediately report signs of unusual disease or pest to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Immediately report signs of unusual disease or pest to management.

pcs.text: Clean and disinfect worksites, production areas, sheds, facilities, plant, feeding, watering and other equipment to stop spread of disease or pest, using appropriate methods and agents, according to regulatory and enterprise biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and disinfect worksites, production areas, sheds, facilities, plant, feeding, watering and other equipment to stop spread of disease or pest, using appropriate methods and agents, according to regulatory and enterprise biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and disinfect worksites, production areas, sheds, facilities, plant, feeding, watering and other equipment to stop spread of disease or pest, using appropriate methods and agents, according to regulatory and enterprise biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Check, adjust and/or apply pest, vermin and/or predator controls according to biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, adjust and/or apply pest, vermin and/or predator controls according to biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, adjust and/or apply pest, vermin and/or predator controls according to biosecurity requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement biosecurity procedures on detection of disease or pest

elements.title: Monitor and report outcomes

pcs.text: Monitor effectiveness of biosecurity control activities, and compare with enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor effectiveness of biosecurity control activities, and compare with enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor effectiveness of biosecurity control activities, and compare with enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor production areas, facilities or sites to ensure biosecurity work practices and procedures are applied
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor production areas, facilities or sites to ensure biosecurity work practices and procedures are applied?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor production areas, facilities or sites to ensure biosecurity work practices and procedures are applied.

pcs.text: Complete biosecurity records and report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete biosecurity records and report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete biosecurity records and report issues according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Review biosecurity controls and suggest changes to improve enterprise biosecurity outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review biosecurity controls and suggest changes to improve enterprise biosecurity outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review biosecurity controls and suggest changes to improve enterprise biosecurity outcomes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor and report outcomes
